response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK C_CBC471
ATTR C_CBC471 : varchar : PK
ATTR given_name : varchar
ATTR family_name : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR departure_airport : varchar
ATTR arrival_airport : varchar
ATTR aircraft_registration : varchar
ATTR aircraft_model : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_code : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY SeatAssignment
PK flight_code, passenger_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR passenger_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR seat : varchar

ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK flight_code, crew_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR crew_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_code
ATTR crew_code : varchar : PK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_label : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatusLog
PK flight_code, status_date, status_time
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_time : time

REL Passenger -> SeatAssignment : 1 -> 0..N : FK=passenger_code
REL Flight -> SeatAssignment : 1 -> 0..N : FK=flight_code
REL Flight -> CrewAssignment : 1 -> 0..N : FK=flight_code
REL CrewMember -> CrewAssignment : 1 -> 0..N : FK=crew_code
REL Airline -> Flight : 1 -> 0..N : FK=airline_code
REL Airport -> Flight : 1 -> 0..N : FK=departure_airport
REL Airport -> Flight : 1 -> 0..N : FK=arrival_airport
REL Flight -> FlightStatusLog : 1 -> 0..N : FK=flight_code
REL FlightStatus -> FlightStatusLog : 1 -> 0..N : FK=status_code
